component.name: PixelKit
component.summary: Pick screen colors and measure pixel distances

description.p: PixelKit provides a system-wide color picker, color editor and screen ruler for Linux. It follows the workflows of the Microsoft PowerToys utilities while using Linux-native X11 and freedesktop portal interfaces.

ul.li: Pixel-accurate full-resolution sampling with a magnifier and keyboard movement
Sixteen built-in formats and editable PowerToys-compatible templates
Color names, clipboard copy, adjustment, variations, export and history
Bounds, cross-spacing, horizontal and vertical measurement modes
Configurable edge tolerance, RGB-channel comparison and line color
Pixel, inch, centimetre and millimetre output

screenshot.caption: Launch and configure the Color Picker and Screen Ruler
Edit saved colors and copy configurable formats

description.p: Initial Linux release with Color Picker, Color Editor, Screen Ruler, X11 integration and Wayland portals.
